<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Requests for client personal contact information (name, email, phone) — not representable in any allowed field', 'Requests for government-issued ID, proof of address, or proof of funds — personal identification data not covered by template', 'Request for signed property viewing acknowledgment form — no template field for signature or acknowledgment documents', 'Reference to placeholder name “The client” and request to replace with real identity — identity substitution not supported', 'Offering optional concierge service (mail forwarding, appliance installation coordination) — not covered under service_packages or utility_services', 'Mention of nearby amenities like boardwalk, grocery plaza, hospital distance — detailed amenity descriptions not in property_listings schema']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "13, ['Property listings with details on price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, accessibility, condo fees — maps to property_listings', 'Property types (condo, bungalow) — property_type field', 'Accessibility features (elevator_access, ramp_access, wide_doorways, walk_in_shower) — accessibility_features field', 'Location region and neighborhood descriptors (downtown, suburbs, etc.) — location_neighborhood and location_region fields', 'Maintenance or condo fees — condo_fees_monthly and maintenance_level fields', 'Availability and scheduling of viewings (dates, times, morning/afternoon) — viewing_coordination fields', 'Viewing type (in_person) — viewing_type field', 'Financing method (cash purchase) and associated fees — financing_options fields', 'Legal service packages (basic, premium, rush) with costs and durations — service_packages fields', 'Service activation and confirmation updates (property on hold, viewing secured) — status_updates fields', 'Moving service options (standard, premium, white_glove) with costs and features — moving_services fields', 'Utility service packages (basic, premium) with included services and costs — utility_services fields', 'Coordination of timeline (March move-in, mid-March closing) — timeline_coordination fields']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Requests for client personal contact information (name, email, phone) — not representable in any allowed field', 'Requests for government-issued ID, proof of address, or proof of funds — personal identification data not covered by template', 'Request for signed property viewing acknowledgment form — no template field for signature or acknowledgment documents', 'Reference to placeholder name “The client” and request to replace with real identity — identity substitution not supported', 'Offering optional concierge service (mail forwarding, appliance installation coordination) — not covered under service_packages or utility_services', 'Mention of nearby amenities like boardwalk, grocery plaza, hospital distance — detailed amenity descriptions not in property_listings schema']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
